channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Ondo suspends 27 secondary school students over misconduct
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Ondo State Ministry of Education suspends 27 secondary school students from three Akure schools due to gross misconduct and unruly behaviour.
Read More: https://punchng.com/ondo-suspends-27-secondary-school-students-over-misconduct/

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Ministry of Defence refutes claims of unpaid House Officers’ allowances, confirming payments have commenced and addressing the delay caused by budgetar
Read More: https://punchng.com/defence-ministry-denies-claims-of-unpaid-house-officers-allowances/

item.title: Man Utd complete £50m signing of Santos from Chelsea
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Man Utd have completed the signing of Andrey Santos from Chelsea for £50m.

item.title: FG expands cancer patient support funds to check treatment costs
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Federal Government has expanded financial support for cancer patients, introducing new funds and insurance to reduce cancer treatment cost in Nigeria.
Read More: https://punchng.com/fg-expands-cancer-patient-support-funds-to-check-treatment-costs/

item.title: McCullum responds to Test side sacking: 'It's a results business... I'll wear it'
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Brendon McCullum gives his thoughts after being sacked from his role as head coach of the England Test side.

item.title: 'We aren't exposed to this format' | Edwards on why India thrashed England
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Charlotte Edwards spoke honestly about why India beat England at Lord's and talked about preparation for the Ashes.

item.title: Atiku welcomes WAEC, NECO fee hike suspension, knocks govt ‘poor planning’

item.description:
Atiku Abubakar welcomes the suspension of WAEC and NECO fee hikes, criticising the government’s ‘poor planning’ and lack of consultation on the proposed in
Read More: https://punchng.com/atiku-welcomes-waec-neco-fee-hike-suspension-knocks-govt-poor-planning/

item.title: Sultanate Council urges Muslims to look out for Safar 1448AH crescent
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Sultanate Council calls on Nigerian Muslims to look out for the Safar 1448AH new moon on July 14, 2026. Report sightings to local leaders.
Read More: https://punchng.com/sultanate-council-urges-muslims-to-look-out-for-safar-1448ah-crescent/

item.title: Eight killed as assailants attack Benue community after burial
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Armed assailants attacked Otukpo Nobi community in Benue, killing eight and injuring five after a burial. Police are investigating the Benue attack.
Read More: https://punchng.com/eight-killed-as-assailants-attack-benue-community-after-burial/

item.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?

item.dc:creator: TVC News

Rhodes-Vivour disclosed the development in a post on his official X account on Monday. According to the announcement,

item.title: World Cup semifinal: will France get their revenge on Spain?
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The French football team arrived in Dallas on July 12 ahead of their semifinal World Cup fixture against Spain. France reached the last four with a 2-0 victory against Morocco while Spain beat Belgium 2-1 in their quarter-final. While France are the favourites by a slim margin, Spain have had the be

item.title: Cocoa’s Uneven Demand Recovery Runs Into Fresh Price Volatility
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Cocoa demand is expected to remain uneven across the world, suggesting the recovery remains fragile as renewed supply concerns push bean prices higher and threaten to keep chocolate pricier for longer.

item.description: Manchester United are not ruling out signing Ederson this summer despite a breakdown in the deal over a medical issue.

item.description: Her election as the first African woman to the International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea is a landmark moment for her native Ghana and for the continent’s voice in global justice.

Both US and Iran claim control over the Strait of Hormuz. In a telephone interview with Fox News on Monday, President Donald T

item.title: Gunmen Abduct Oyo Headmaster, Demand N30m Ransom
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Suspected gunmen have abducted the headmaster of Nomadic Basic School, Igbojaye, Budo Aare, in Itesiwaju Local Government Area of Oyo State, 60-year-old Kolawale Mathew Owoade, popularly known as Onaiye. The abductors are reportedly demanding a ransom of N30 million for his release. According to The

item.title: Iran launches drone, missile attacks on dissident bases in Iraqi Kurdistan
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Iran's military forces recently carried out heavy air strikes on bases belonging to Iranian Kurdish militia groups in Iraqi Kurdistan. These unprecedented attacks underscore Tehran’s fear that these militias could become more offensive amid the instability fuelled by the war with Israel and the US.

item.title: Nigeria oil output hits six-year high, above OPEC target
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Nigeria's crude production reached a 74-month high last month, authorities said over the weekend, hitting an average of 1.56 million barrels per day, or 104 percent of its OPEC quota. The post Nigeria oil output hits six-year high, above OPEC target appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.description: In less than 24 hours, a fleet of tiger helicopters will fly over Paris during the July 14 parade. They are among the French Army’s most formidable combat aircraft. Four of them were, in fact, recently on a mission in the Middle East. They destroyed several Iranian Shahed drones that were targeting

item.title: Shein Is Said to Target Up to $3 Billion Hong Kong IPO by August
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Shein Global Holdings Ltd. is seeking to list in Hong Kong as soon as in August after securing approval from China’s securities regulator, according to people familiar with the matter.

item.description: The Nigerian Navy has prevented another attempt by crude oil theft syndicates to establish illegal storage infrastructure within the Bonny axis of Rivers. item.description: French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said authorities were exploring the possibility that the fire in the Fontainebleau forest, south of Paris, was intentionally started. item.title: Saylor’s Strategy Raises Reserve to $3 Billion With Stock Sale
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. raised about $467 million through the sale of common stock, lifting its cash reserve to roughly $3 billion while refraining from buying or selling Bitcoin.

item.title: England annihilated by India in women's Test at Lord's
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England crashed to a second heavy defeat at Lord's in a little over a week with India needing just over 90 minutes on the final day of the historic first women's Test at the ground to wrap up a 270-run victory.

item.description: Washington, D.C. has become a battleground for Uber and Waymo's competing views.

item.title: Bring on the BOSH! Johnny Fisher signs for Zuffa
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Heavyweight contender Johnny Fisher has signed for Zuffa and will fight live on Sky Sports at Copper Box Arena on September 26th.

item.title: Fisher fights on September 26 live on Sky after signing with Zuffa
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Johnny Fisher has signed a promotional agreement with Zuffa Boxing and will fight on Sky Sports.

item.title: ‘I’ve no idea how they got her number’: My student-loan servicer called a friend after I missed a payment. Is that legal?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “She said it’s the second message they have left.”

item.title: Nigeria’s private sector moves to unlock inclusive growth
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: Senior government officials, regulators, development finance institutions and business leaders have launched the Nigeria Gender Country Program (NGCP), signalling a read more Nigeria’s private sector moves to unlock inclusive growth

item.title: 5 questions Chipotle must answer to break out of its 2026 stock slump
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Police raid criminal black spots, arrest 63 suspects, recover illicit drugs in Yobe
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Yobe State Police Command has arrested 63 suspects and recovered a cache of illicit drugs and dangerous weapons during a coordinated raid on criminal hideouts in Damaturu metropolis. The Command disclosed this in a statement issued on Monday by its Public Relations Officer, SP Dungus Abdulkarim,

item.title: Obi Commends Suspension Of WASSCE, NECO Fee Hike
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress Presidential Candidate, Peter Obi, has commended the Federal Government’s decision to suspend the proposed review of registration fees for the 2027 West African Senior School Certificate Examination and the National Examinations Council Senior School Certificate Exami
